question: Will the price of Bitcoin be above $72,000 on April 16?

fragility_points: A late macro or crypto-specific shock could erase the cushion quickly.
The exact one-minute close matters; being above 72,000 at nearby times is insufficient.
key_assumptions: BTC remains in roughly its current trading regime through settlement without a sudden >2.5%-3% downside move.
Binance remains the operative venue and the plain reading of the settlement mechanics holds.
main_logical_chain: Read Polymarket rules to identify the governing source, field, pair, and timestamp.
Verify the settlement minute timing as 12:00 ET = 16:00 UTC on 2026-04-16.
Check direct Binance BTCUSDT venue data to see whether BTC currently has meaningful cushion above 72,000.

Apply an outside-view prior that liquid BTC more often than not holds a modest cushion over about one day absent a new shock, while discounting for short-horizon volatility and single-minute settlement fragility.
Conclude Yes is likely but only slightly less favorable than the market implies.
payload.main_thesis: BTC is already materially above 72,000, so this is mainly a short-horizon threshold-retention question; Yes is likely but not certain because a single-minute settlement print leaves room for a late volatility-driven break below the line.
quote_anchors: This market will resolve to 'Yes' if the Binance 1 minute candle for BTC/USDT 12:00 in the ET timezone (noon) on the date specified in the title has a final 'Close' price higher than the price specified in the title.
ET noon on 2026-04-16 converts to 16:00 UTC.
payload.source_quality_view: Source quality is good for a medium-difficulty case: Polymarket rules are direct for mechanics and Binance API is direct for venue-state verification; independence is medium and source-of-truth ambiguity is low to medium.
strongest_disconfirmers: BTC can still move several percent in a day, and a brief selloff into the exact settlement minute would be enough for No.
Single-minute settlement makes the contract more fragile than a broader daily-close framing.
strongest_supports: Binance spot during the run was around 73,977, leaving roughly a 2.7% cushion above the 72,000 threshold.
A direct Binance 1-minute kline pull showed all sampled recent closes above 72,000.
The contract only requires staying above the line at one specific settlement minute, and BTC is already above it.
payload.timing_relevance: The market resolves off one exact Binance BTC/USDT 1-minute close at 12:00 ET on 2026-04-16, making the ET-to-UTC conversion and remaining time-to-settlement central to the analysis.
unresolved_ambiguities: No material contract ambiguity remains, but UI timestamp labeling on exchange candles always merits care.

payload.what_would_change_view: A move toward the low-72k area, a spike in realized volatility, a fresh market-moving shock, or any credible clarification changing which candle/timestamp/field governs would move the estimate.
